_comment: POST https://zernio.com/api/v1/ads/create with Bearer auth + an Idempotency-Key header (UUID). Multi-creative shape: creatives[] (min 1, no max) -> 1 campaign + 1 ad set + N ads sharing budget/targeting. Each creative: headline, body, linkUrl, callToAction required + EXACTLY ONE of imageUrl or video{url,thumbnailUrl}. NO paused-on-create: immediately follow with PUT /v1/ads/campaigns/{platformCampaignId}/status {status:'paused', platform:'facebook'} so nothing spends. Operator decides copy/audience/budget; confirm before firing.
accountId: <Zernio ads SocialAccount id — GET /v1/connect/facebook/ads or GET /v1/accounts>
name: Creative Test — <offer> — <YYYY-MM-DD>

_after_create.verify: GET /v1/ads/tree — confirm 1 campaign / 1 ad set / N ads, paused
_after_create.go_live: ONLY on explicit human confirmation + restated budget: same status call with "active"
